rules.project_level: one record per project_id; canonical money is non-zero mode, tie chooses maximum and conflict is flagged
rules.contract_level: one record per project_id + contract_no + winner_tin + winner_name
rules.contract_value: contract_price_agree; fallback to sum_price_agree only when project has exactly one contract record
